heading: Definitions
label: 1667a Definitions
notes: Codificationis based on section 181 of title I of S. 1790, One Hundred Eleventh Congress, as reported by the Committee on Indian Affairs of the Senate in Dec. 2009, which was enacted into law by .Section 722 of Pub. L. 94–437section 10221(a) of Pub. L. 111–148

children.heading: Administration
children.label: 1 Administration
children.text: The term “Administration” means the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration.

children.heading: Demonstration project
children.label: 2 Demonstration project
children.text: The term “demonstration project” means the Indian youth telemental health demonstration project authorized under .section 1667b(a) of this title

children.heading: Telemental health
children.label: 3 Telemental health
children.text: The term “telemental health” means the use of electronic information and telecommunications technologies to support long-distance mental health care, patient and professional-related education, public health, and health administration.
